Class GradingService

java.lang.Object
applicationMain.GradingService
public class GradingService extends Object
Service class for grading student discussions based on their replies.

JUnit tests used:

invalid reference 
applicationMain.GradingServiceTest
nSemi-automated tests used: N/A nManual tests used: GradingService Manual Tests (see Manual Tests.pdf)

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GradingService(PostList postList, entityClasses.ReplyList replyList, applicationMain.Role currentRole)
    Builds a grading service around the shared post/reply stores.

  • Constructor Details

    • GradingService

      public GradingService(PostList postList, entityClasses.ReplyList replyList, applicationMain.Role currentRole)
      Builds a grading service around the shared post/reply stores.
      Parameters:
      postList - list of discussion posts used to resolve recipients
      replyList - list of replies used to compute participation stats
      currentRole - active caller role used for access checks

  • Method Details

    • setCurrentRole

      public void setCurrentRole(applicationMain.Role currentRole)
      Updates the active role used by protected grading methods.
      Parameters:
      currentRole - new role to apply for authorization

    • addReply

      public entityClasses.Reply addReply(int replyId, int postId, String body, String replierId)
      Adds a reply while preserving who authored the original post. This relationship is required for rule-of-three analytics.
      Parameters:
      replyId - unique reply id
      postId - target post id
      body - reply content
      replierId - author id for the replier
      Returns:
      saved reply

    • countUniqueStudentsAnswered

      public int countUniqueStudentsAnswered(String studentId) throws applicationMain.AccessDeniedException
      Computes how many different students this student has replied to.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being evaluated
      Returns:
      number of unique recipients
      Throws:
      applicationMain.AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • checkGradingEligibility

      public boolean checkGradingEligibility(String studentId) throws applicationMain.AccessDeniedException
      Assignment-facing method name for the rule-of-three check.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being evaluated
      Returns:
      true if student has replied to at least three unique recipients
      Throws:
      applicationMain.AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • meetsThreeUniqueRequirement

      public boolean meetsThreeUniqueRequirement(String studentId) throws applicationMain.AccessDeniedException
      Backward-compatible alias for rule-of-three eligibility.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being evaluated
      Returns:
      true when eligibility is met
      Throws:
      applicationMain.AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • getAnswersForReview

      public List<entityClasses.Reply> getAnswersForReview(String studentId) throws applicationMain.AccessDeniedException
      Returns all replies authored by a student for quick reasonableness review.
      Parameters:
      studentId - student id being reviewed
      Returns:
      list of replies by the student
      Throws:
      applicationMain.AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role

    • showAllStats

      public Map<String,Integer> showAllStats() throws applicationMain.AccessDeniedException
      Builds a compact map of student id to unique-recipient count.
      Returns:
      stats map used by grader/teacher view
      Throws:
      applicationMain.AccessDeniedException - when caller is not staff/instructor role
